summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.model; import java.util.Collections; import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; import org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject; import org.eclipse.emf.ecore.xmi.XMLResource; import org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Display; public class ModelUtils { public static final Map<String, Object> SAVE_OPTIONS = new HashMap<String, Object>(); static { SAVE_OPTIONS.put(XMLResource.OPTION_ENCODING, "UTF-8"); } public static void doSave(final EObject eObject) { doSave(eObject, SAVE_OPTIONS); }
